port_metadata.provider: Compañía Marítima Mexicana, S.A. de C.V.

geographic_scope_and_terminals.limits: Between the entrance breakwaters and the terrestrial port perimeter
terminals: All terminals within the terrestrial port perimeter of Altamira

time_measurement.movement_time_definition: Legally considered to be 20 minutes before the time indicated in the service request
time_measurement.start_trigger: Time lines are received or the tug is at the indicated place
time_measurement.end_trigger: Time lines are cast off and the tug's presence is no longer required

duration_logic.rounding: Any fraction of 15 minutes is rounded up to a full 15-minute period
duration_logic.surcharge_basis: 25% of the base maneuver rate per 15-minute increment

bow_thruster_rules.standard: Vessels with an operational Bow Thruster utilize the 'With Bow Thruster' rate column
bow_thruster_rules.exception_two_tugs: If two tugs are specifically requested for a vessel equipped with a Bow Thruster, the 'Without Bow Thruster' rate must be applied

vessel_and_equipment_logic.horsepower_neutrality: Rates are applied based solely on vessel GRT, regardless of the Horsepower (HP) of the tugs employed

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Small Vessel Discount
surcharges_and_multipliers.condition: Vessels less than 2,500 GRT requesting service
surcharges_and_multipliers.logic: Charge is 70% of the minimum scale (Under 2,500 bracket)

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Late Cancellation
surcharges_and_multipliers.condition: Notice given < 1 hour before tug movement (Requested Time - 20 mins)

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Cancellation After Movement
surcharges_and_multipliers.condition: User desists after tugs have started moving

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Waiting Time
surcharges_and_multipliers.condition: Tug waits due to vessel delay
surcharges_and_multipliers.basis: Per hour or fraction, starting from time indicated in request

vessel_types.note: Exempt from this tariff; billed under office DGP.-1278/2024 (April 4, 2024)

service_types.note: Not subject to fixed rates; subject to international customs and negotiation

administrative_subtext.notice_period: 3 hours in advance during office hours (Mon-Fri 09:00-19:30, Sat 09:00-13:00). After hours via VHF
administrative_subtext.payment_requirement: Users must cover estimated amount at the time of request
administrative_subtext.resolution_authority: General Directorate of Ports of the Secretariat of the Navy
